title: Italian Shrimp with Crunchy Veracruzan Crust
description: A fusion twist on traditional Italian seafood dishes, this recipe combines succulent shrimp with a crunchy Veracruzan crust for a flavorful and crunchy main course.
instructions: Rinse shrimp and pat dry with paper towels.
In a shallow dish, mix together Veracruzan, xtra crunchy, and crispy fried.
Dip each shrimp into the Veracruzan mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place coated shrimp on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with tacos.
